title: Find Longest Awesome Substring
titleCn: 找出最长的超赞子字符串

testcases.input: s = "3242415" Output: 5 Explanation: "24241" is the longest awesome substring, we can form the palindrome "24142" with some swaps.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: "24241" is the longest awesome substring, we can form the palindrome "24142" with some swaps.

testcases.input: s = "213123" Output: 6 Explanation: "213123" is the longest awesome substring, we can form the palindrome "231132" with some swaps.
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: "213123" is the longest awesome substring, we can form the palindrome "231132" with some swaps.
